<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/deployment/console_access.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-deployment-console-access-none-104" location="lines:104-120" -->
```
canton {
  remote-sequencers {
    sequencer {
      public-api {
        port = 5008
        address = localhost
      }
      admin-api {
        port = 5009
        address = localhost
      }
    }
  }
  features.enable-preview-commands = yes
  features.enable-testing-commands = yes
  features.enable-repair-commands = yes
}
```
